vehicle.label: Long-Range Surveillance Wing
vehicle.desc: Fixed-wing flying-wing UAV, 2m wingspan, 4+ hour endurance

parts.label: Center Body Pod
parts.spec: Flying-wing center pod, equipment bay door, wing-spar reinforcement, motor pylon at rear

parts.label: Wing Spar (2-piece)
parts.spec: 20mm CFRP main spar, 2-piece centerjoint, anti-rotation key, 800mm half-span each

parts.label: Wing Rib Set x 12
parts.spec: Wing rib NACA airfoil profile, lightening pockets, leading edge sock, trailing edge taper

parts.label: Elevon Servo Pocket x 2
parts.spec: Elevon servo pocket, MG90S or DS215MG, control horn linkage, removable access cover

parts.label: Motor + Pusher Prop Mount
parts.spec: Rear pusher 2814 BLDC mount, 10x7 folding prop clearance, thrust line +1deg down

parts.label: GPS + Pitot Boom
parts.spec: Nose boom 8mm, GPS at tip, pitot static port forward, BEC airflow shielded

parts.label: Camera Gimbal Bay
parts.spec: Forward downward camera gimbal bay 70mm deep, 2-axis micro gimbal, optical window

parts.label: Battery Bay (Slide)
parts.spec: 4S 16000mAh Li-ion slide-in bay, CG adjust slot, top access hatch, balance lead window

parts.label: Integration Service Backbone
parts.spec: Wing/fuselage integration service backbone with assembly_datum pads, harness_raceway, service_hatch, connector_keying, anti-rotation wing datum, and visible load-path inspection marks

requirements: Provide structural support for wing spars
Integrate motor pylon mount with bolt pattern
Ensure airflow for cooling non-operational motor pod
Facilitate equipment bay door access
Maintain thermal management through equipment bay door

risk.mit: Review design for any hidden interfaces and ensure they are accessible.

risk.mit: Verify engagement length for all threaded connections.

risk.mit: Conduct additional testing to confirm structural integrity.

physics_paths.description: Structural loads from wing spars transferred to motor pylon mount.
Airflow for cooling non-operational motor pod.
Thermal management through equipment bay door.

generated_parts.label: Wing Spar (2-piece)
generated_parts.spec: 20mm CFRP main spar, 2-piece centerjoint, anti-rotation key, 800mm half-span each

requirements: Structures: Main spar, ribs, carry-through, fuselage frames; continuous load path
Load path continuity: Lift, landing, and payload loads trace through continuous structure
Thermal management: Heat from sun absorbed by spar transferred to coolant channel for dissipation
Electrical/data transmission: Power and data transmission from battery bay to sensor module
Service access: Battery bay uses slide rail, CG marks, and independent payload/battery removal

verify.rule: cad_brief.mass_est_g must be within budget

verify.value: All features traceable from part_tree to geometry_ops
verify.rule: Each feature in part_tree must have corresponding geometry_ops

verify.value: All interfaces have reciprocal definitions
verify.rule: Adjacent interfaces must have matching definitions in neighboring parts

verify.value: Visible washers and locking mechanisms present
verify.rule: Critical joints need visible locking/preload evidence

risk.desc: Potential thermal expansion issues due to varying materials in spar and foam core
risk.mit: Conduct thermal expansion analysis and adjust design if necessary

risk.desc: Risk of improper fit between snap-fit interfaces due to manufacturing tolerances
risk.mit: Implement tighter manufacturing tolerances and conduct fit tests

risk.desc: Possibility of load path discontinuity if ribs are not properly integrated
risk.mit: Ensure ribs are securely attached to spar and carry-through

risk.desc: Risk of electrical harness damage due to inadequate clearance in cutouts
risk.mit: Increase clearance around electrical harness cutouts

risk.desc: Potential misalignment during assembly due to hidden datum points
risk.mit: Ensure all datum points are clearly visible and labeled

_subsystem_plan.subsystem_role: Main spar, ribs, carry-through, fuselage frames; continuous load path

physics_paths.description: Transfers lift and landing loads from wing skin to fuselage frame
Heat from sun absorbed by spar transferred to coolant channel for dissipation
Airflow-induced vibrations transmitted to ribs for dampening
Power and data transmission from battery bay to sensor module

integration_opportunities.description: Integrate spar socket with wing root joint for seamless load transfer
Incorporate coolant channel for efficient heat dissipation
Ensure electrical harness cutout aligns with battery bay harness routing

manufacturing_strategy.datum: Primary locating faces and axis rings
manufacturing_strategy.support: Support structures oriented for minimal material waste
manufacturing_strategy.inspection: Visual inspection of spar socket, anti-rotation key, and center datum

verification_focus.description: Check bolted and snap-fit interfaces for proper clearance
Confirm continuous load path from wing skin to fuselage frame

generated_parts.label: Wing Rib Set x 12
generated_parts.spec: Wing rib NACA airfoil profile, lightening pockets, leading edge sock, trailing edge taper

requirements: Provide structural support for the wing
Optimize aerodynamic performance with NACA airfoil profile
Include lightening pockets for weight reduction
Feature leading edge sock and trailing edge taper for improved airflow
Integrate control surface cutouts with hinges
Ensure spar socket for secure mounting

verify.rule: Ensure all required fields and features are present.
Ensure the mass estimate does not exceed the allocated budget.
Ensure P0 internal_feature_targets are represented in part_tree/geometry_ops.
Ensure interfaces are reciprocal with neighboring subsystems.
Ensure critical joints have visible locking or preload evidence.

risk.desc: Potential aerodynamic inefficiency due to trailing edge taper.
risk.mit: Conduct wind tunnel tests to validate design.

risk.desc: Risk of structural failure at spar socket.
risk.mit: Perform finite element analysis on spar socket.

risk.desc: Possibility of incorrect alignment during assembly.
risk.mit: Include clear assembly order hints and visual guides.

risk.desc: Risk of thermal stress due to sunlight exposure.
risk.mit: Implement heat dissipation features in design.

risk.desc: Potential for increased manufacturing complexity.
risk.mit: Review manufacturing strategy for optimization.

physics_paths.path: Lift force from airflow -> Spar -> Rib body -> Wing skin
Airflow over NACA airfoil -> Leading edge sock -> Trailing edge taper
Sunlight heat -> Rib body -> Heat dissipation through rib structure

integration_opportunities.opportunity: Reduces weight without compromising structural integrity

risk.desc: Risk of insufficient support structure for FDM printing.

risk.mit: Increase separation distance or add shielding between the two components.
